subject: Rose Tower — a tall modern corporate tower with distinctive angular green architecture
description: A striking futuristic tower rendered in angular teal and green forms rises prominently in the center of the image. The building has a distinctive geometric design with sharp diagonal lines and a tapered profile, suggesting an elite corporate headquarters. The surrounding area shows a manicured plaza or grounds in muted greens, with a pale sky in the background. The overall palette is cool and clean, evoking corporate modernity and institutional authority.
foreground: plaza or grounds surrounding the tower base
background: pale sky with minimal cloud detail
